name: Dr. Maggies's Old Fashioned Spoon Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Butter (Do Not Substitute Margarine), heaping
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk.
2. Slowly add the cornmeal, sugar, and salt to the scalded milk while stirring constantly.
3. Cook until it puffs up, stirring continuously.
4. Turn off the heat and stir in the butter.
5. Allow the mixture to cool for 3 minutes.
6. Stir in well-beaten egg yolks.
7. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
8. Grease a dish with cooking oil.
9. Bake until brown and cracked near the edges, about 50 minutes at 350°F.
10. The bread will fall when removed from the oven, so eat it immediately with plenty of butter.
Serves 4
